sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, text STRING);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'DuckDB is a great database');
UPDATE test_strings SET text = array_slice(text, 6, 10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT array_slice(text, 1, 4) AS sliced_text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT array_slice(text, -10, NULL) AS sliced_text FROM test_strings;
